headline: EU Crypto Exodus Looms Amid MiCA Regulations

article.title: More MiCA-licensed crypto firms could exit EU market: Gate Europe CEO
article.summary: Gate Europe’s Giovanni Cunti says some MiCA-licensed crypto firms may struggle to sustain compliance costs as Europe enters its new regulatory era.

headline: Russia Passes Crypto Law Amid $2T Market Volatility

article.title: Russian parliament passes law regulating crypto market
article.summary: The State Duma legislation creates a regulated framework for crypto market participants and now moves to President Vladimir Putin for his signature before becoming law.

article.title: LA’s $1.2 Billion Graffiti Towers Cleared to Exit Bankruptcy
article.summary: The bankrupt $1.2 billion Oceanwide Plaza project in Los Angeles, dubbed the Graffiti Towers after taggers spray-painted the abandoned complex, has been cleared for sale and possible completion more than seven years after the original Chinese developer ran out of money.

headline: S&P 500 Falls 2% as Growth Fears Rise

article.title: Economic Momentum Flips From Blessing to Curse for S&P 500 Bulls
article.summary: Strong economic momentum is a double-edged sword for US equity traders. Solid growth is an earnings tailwind. But let it run too hot, and it turns from blessing to curse.

headline: Galaxy Invests $5M to Mitigate Bitcoin Quantum Risk

article.summary: The crypto firm's initiative arrives as researchers, exchanges, and the U.S. government warn that "Q-Day" may land as soon as 2030.

headline: Crypto Rally Sparks 15% Gain Amid Clarity Act Revival

article.summary: Odds of the Clarity Act passing in 2026 jumped to 42% after a surprising new development from the White House.

headline: Robinhood Chain TVL Surges Past $430 Million

article.summary: Robinhood Chain hit $431M TVL and 250K+ daily users in under three weeks, but memecoins account for 80% of its $9B DEX volume, FalconX says.

headline: CoinShares Unveils $1Bn Crypto UCITS Platform For Europe

article.title: CoinShares launches UCITS platform targeting Europe’s institutional investors
article.summary: CoinShares is expanding into Europe's $30 trillion UCITS ecosystem with the launch of a new platform and a Bitcoin Mining ETF.

headline: Trump Reimposes 10% Tariffs Amid Trade Tension

article.title: Trump prepares fresh tariff barrage with 10% levies set to expire
article.summary: US president to renew trade war after Supreme Court threw out reciprocal duties

headline: US Slaps 50% Tariffs on Canada Goods
